plan_kinds.summary: Resolve an app descriptor, profile set, packs, modules, providers, platform, renderer, and capabilities for a product launch.
Resolve a Workbench workspace composition without implementing a workspace runtime.
Resolve a deterministic pack or package mount plan without mounting payloads.
Resolve profile inputs and explicit overrides without applying runtime profile state.
Resolve provider candidates and decisions for requested service/backend kinds.
Resolve module enablement from descriptors and declared capabilities.
Resolve release-facing composition projection without publishing release artifacts.
Resolve fixture-only composition evidence that is not a support claim.
